source_label: arXiv 2108.12409 — Train Short, Test Long: Attention with Linear Biases (ALiBi), Press et al., ICLR 2022
notes: ALiBi = Attention with Linear Biases, a transformer position method used in BLOOM and MPT. The camelCase ALiBi cues that it reads as the everyday English word "alibi" (STRESS: AL-uh-by, first syllable) — not spelled out A-L-I-B-I, and the "-bi" is long-i ("by"), not "bee". Paper/GitHub don't document the pronunciation, so community-consensus, but the wordplay is unambiguous.
